hooks.command: jq -c 'select(.tool_name // "" | startswith("mcp__channel__")) | {ts: (now | strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")), tool: .tool_name, chat_id: (.tool_input.chat_id // .tool_input.user_id // null), request_id: .tool_input.request_id, input_bytes: (.tool_input | tostring | length), output_bytes: (.tool_response | tostring | length)}' >> /tmp/xiaobai_stats.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true
